title: Fleet Status Manifest
description: Shared state file written by fleet-orchestrator workers and read by the supervisor. All writers MUST hold an exclusive flock on <manifest>.lock. Readers SHOULD hold a shared lock.

schema_version.description: Semantic version of this schema. Bump on any breaking change.

fleet_id.description: Unique fleet identifier; timestamp-based for human readability.

started_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when the supervisor initialized the fleet.

ended_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when the last worker terminated. Null while the fleet is active.

directive.description: Verbatim directive text the supervisor fanned out. Workers receive this as their spec.

max_parallel.description: Supervisor's concurrency cap. Workers beyond this wait in queued state.

max_retries.description: Maximum retry attempts for transient CI failures per worker.

pre_excluded.description: Repos that failed pre-flight checks and were never dispatched.

workers.description: One entry per dispatched repo. Order matches the supervisor's dispatch order.

summary.description: Computed by the supervisor after all workers terminate. Null while the fleet is active.

status.description: Terminal states: completed, failed, skipped. Non-terminal: queued, running.

phase.description: Fine-grained state within the worker's lifecycle. Used by the supervisor's status table.

started_at.description: When the worker moved from queued to running.

updated_at.description: Last time the worker wrote to the manifest. Stuck-detection uses this.

ended_at.description: When the worker reached a terminal state.

task_id.description: Supervisor-side Agent task ID for this worker. Supervisor fills this on dispatch.

issue_number.description: Issue the worker created or consumed for this directive. Null when directive did not require an issue.

branch.description: Feature branch name the worker created off develop.

pr_url.description: Full GitHub PR URL. Populated once the worker creates a PR.

ci_conclusion.description: Terminal CI outcome for the worker's PR. Null while CI is still running.

merge_status.description: Final PR state. 'merged' is the only success; 'draft' signals user review is needed.

retry_count.description: Number of CI retries the worker has attempted.

log_dir.description: Absolute path to the per-worker workspace, e.g. '_workspace/fleet/kcenon-repo-a/'. Preserved for audit.

class.description: Machine-readable failure category. Supervisor uses this to decide escalation vs silent aggregation.

message.description: Human-readable error detail. Include file paths or log excerpts when relevant.

recoverable.description: Hint from the worker: true if a fresh fleet run against this repo could succeed, false if user intervention is required.

total.description: Total workers dispatched. Excludes pre_excluded entries.

skipped.description: Workers with status=skipped (e.g., issue was closed by someone else mid-run).
